message: Pipeline started for idiopathic pulmonary fibrosis and budget was reserved for paid research services.
Literature completed: 9 disease-focused papers cleared from 14 retrieved papers
DrugDB completed: 7 ChEMBL targets, 5 Open Targets drug rows, 12 activity-linked molecules, and 8 expanded candidates
Pathway completed: 8 pathways, 3 active trials, 2 genetic evidence blocks
Repurposing completed: 2 shortlist hypotheses and 1 follow-up hypothesis prepared for evidence review
Evidence completed: scored 2 candidates for final review
Red-team completed with 1 caution note for safety monitoring
Report completed: 1 top candidate, 1 early-stage hypothesis, and supporting literature packaged for delivery
Pipeline completed and the report package is ready.
